title: Valve announces Steam Machine price at $1,049 and opens pre-orders to mixed reviews
summary: The portable device with SteamOS goes on sale at a much higher cost than expected, generating divided opinions among analysts and players.

title: CD Projekt Red acknowledges reputational damage following disastrous launch of Cyberpunk 2077
summary: The executives of the Polish studio admit that they lost the trust of players and seek to regain it with their upcoming releases.

title: Hideo Kojima reveals a new horror game and details of the Death Stranding movie
summary: The Japanese creator aims to terrify players with an experience that evokes P.T., while preparing a risky film adaptation.

title: Unofficial The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake canceled after pressure from Nintendo
summary: The fan-made project in Unreal Engine ceases development following legal warning from the Japanese company.

title: Pokémon to get a stop-motion animated series created by Aardman
summary: The Wallace and Gromit studio will take the franchise to a never-before-seen region with its characteristic handcrafted style.

title: Warframe developers lament the end of Destiny 2 and its impact on the genre
summary: The creators of the sci-fi game believe that the industry loses diversity with the disappearance of Bungie's title.

title: Ori creator calls Xbox Game Pass 'crap factory' and compares it to communism
summary: Thomas Mahler harshly criticizes Microsoft's subscription model, stating that it promotes mediocre content.

title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in plane accident
summary: The 80-year-old executive, brother of founder Yves Guillemot, lost his life in an air accident in France.

title: EA announces new round of layoffs as it prepares for sale to Saudi Arabia
summary: The company continues with staff cuts to adapt its structure to market demands.

title: Blue Reflection Quartet opens pre-orders and shows its second trailer
summary: The fourth installment of Koei Tecmo's role-playing and action series is now available for pre-order on consoles and PC.

title: Rose & Camellia Collection adds online battle mode
summary: The compilation of ladies' fighting receives an update that allows remote multiplayer matches.

title: Gears of War: E-Day brings back co-op and multiplayer with a realistic war setting
summary: The new prequel of the saga promises to return to its roots with a cinematic approach similar to Saving Private Ryan.

title: House of the Dragon season 3 premieres shrouded in controversy over a dialogue
summary: A comment in the first episode has divided the audience and generated intense debate on social media.

title: Fan mod revives The Last of Us Part 2 multiplayer on PC
summary: The community has created an unofficial version of the online mode that Sony abandoned for the original game.

title: Critical Role begins its fourth campaign with 13 players and the death of its first character
summary: The popular live role-playing series kicks off a massive new adventure with unexpected twists from the first episode.

title: Xbox prepares a film adaptation of Sea of Thieves and other audiovisual projects
summary: The video game company expands its narrative universe with a dozen films and series based on its franchises.

title: GTA 6 fans debate over strange details as alleged leaked prices are debunked
summary: The community speculates about the absence of reflections on a Ferris wheel, and an insider clarifies that the rumored prices are false.

title: Fortnite adds an Olivia Rodrigo Easter egg and Supergirl skin causes uproar
summary: The battle royale continues combining musical and superhero collaborations to keep players engaged.

title: Artificial intelligence arrives in video game development with a WoW mod and the ethical debate
summary: While a fan creates a single-player version of the MMO with AI, CD Projekt executives warn about the risks of generative AI.

title: Fortress building game SAND finally launches on PC after multiple delays
summary: The mecha and strategy title is now available, with recommended graphical settings for optimal performance.
